name: The Box
original_name: กล่องหลอนซ่อนตาย
overview: When a next door neighbor mysteriously dies one day, the next day a puzzling box has been placed in front of everyone's room. The innocent ones are blamed. Because the sender listed on the box is their dead neighbor, they each have to investigate who sent these boxes to everyone and what is inside each of them.

trailers.title: ตัวอย่างอย่างเป็นทางการ The Box กล่องหลอน ซ่อนตาย
